hotel_description:
Nestled along the private shores of Non-Nuoc Beach, against the backdrop of the Marble Mountains in the coastal city of Da Nang, Maha Mangala is a serene oasis, offering respite from the urban bustle.  Located between Da Nang Central and Hoi An City within 20-25 minutes each way, this location seamlessly balances tranquility and convenience.
Upon your arrival at the Zen Garden Domain, you will find a beachfront Tea Space and Mani Dining House, an experience of peaceful living through a wholesome plant-based cuisine and art of tea. An exclusive haven for MM guests. The daily beachside practice of the ‘Morning Bell’ meditation and Ala Carte Breakfast is a perfect beginning to your new day.
Just 4-5 minutes from the Zen Garden Domain, you'll find the Residence Domain, easily accessible with 24/7 buggy services and bicycles at your disposal. The apartments overlook the inviting outdoor swimming pool and lush gardens, providing quick access to Reflections Restaurant, the pool bar, the spa, and the fitness center. These fully-equipped apartments offer the comfort of home, complete with a guide and activities for you to join us in uncovering the art of everyday peaceful living.
Explore our other Domains, where the beach area features an outdoor swimming pool, the Nếp Restaurant featuring Vietnamese cuisine, the White Caps Bar and Bistro, a tennis court, and an outdoor playground for kids. Adjacent to the Da Nang Golf Club, we offer a convenient 3-minute shuttle to the golf courses and complimentary on-site parking.
At Maha Mangala, your journey is beyond nurturing your soul and body but also about discovering the essence of daily practice.
hotel_address: J.02 The Ocean Villas, Truong Sa Road, Ward Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Danang, Vietnam

hotel_description:
Within a 2-minute walk from Ben Thanh Market and the Reunification Palace,  Adora Hotel is a 10-story property with a rooftop sauna , spa bath and free Wi-Fi. Free shoe shine services are available at the lobby. There is also a massage room.

Accessible by elevator, all the air-conditioned rooms come with a flat-screen TV, mini-bar and personal safe. Private bathrooms are equipped with a shower or a bathtub.

Adora Hotel is a 10-minute walk from central Ho Chi Minh City, where guests can visit the Saigon Noter-Dame Basilica, the Saigon Opera House and the War Remnants Museum. It is a 30-minute drive from Tan Son Nhat International Airport.

Guests can visit the beauty salon at the basement, rent a car to explore, or arrange a day trip at the tour desk. The hotel also provides meeting rooms and a business center. Newspapers are available at the 24-hour front desk.

The restaurant on the 2nd floor offers a daily buffet breakfast. It also serves Asian and Western dishes.
hotel_address: 42-44 Thủ Khoa Huân, Phường Bến Thành, Quận 1, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

Luxeden Hotel Hanoi is 16 mi away from Noi Bai International Airport. The Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum and the Temple of Literature are a 10-minute drive away.

Buffet breakfast is served in Luxedin Restaurant, which also offers an all-day Asian and Western menu. Room service is available.

hotel_name: Son Tra Beach Resort & Spa Danang
hotel_description:
This large resort in Danang, is located on the Son Tra Peninsula (Monkey Mountains), along the Danang Bay and private beach. The French-style villas are set against a backdrop of mountains and lush greenery. It features an outdoor swimming pool and an on-site restaurant.

Villas with a private pool come with a flat-screen TV, tea/coffee-making facilities and private bathroom. Free Wi-Fi and a hairdryer are provided. They also feature a living area, kitchen facilities and a private garden.

Guests can enjoy the fresh air and explore the area by mountain bike.

Son Tra Beach Resort & Spa Danang's restaurant serves Vietnamese and International dishes. Guests can enjoy the sea breeze and panoramic views of the sunset while dining in. Fresh seafood is available.

It is a 20-minute drive to Danang International Airport and a 45-minute drive to Hoi An Ancient Town from Son Tra Beach Resort & Spa Danang.
hotel_address: Bai Nam Bai Con Son Tra District, Danang, Vietnam
